personal.preferred_title: Senior Data & Analytics Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS, Spark & AI-Assisted Development

summary: Senior Data and Analytics Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience building data pipelines, analytics-ready datasets, reporting layers, data models, and production data platforms. Strong background in Python, SQL, AWS Redshift, S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark/Spark, dimensional modeling, data quality, observability, documentation, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Daily user of Claude Code and AI-assisted development workflows, with hands-on experience building agentic automation, RAG-style retrieval, quality gates, JSON artifacts, and reproducible engineering pipelines.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained Python/Pandas/PySpark ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, producing curated datasets for analytics, reporting, forecasting, and stakeholder decision-making.
Designed hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, Oracle schemas, SQL, and PySpark to support scalable analytics and model-ready data workflows.
Developed reusable reporting layers, SQL views, dashboards, and dimensional-style datasets that converted raw infrastructure telemetry into business-ready capacity and performance insights.
Prepared clean, documented datasets for Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting workflows, supporting capacity planning and proactive bottleneck prediction.
Implemented data validation, reconciliation, monitoring, and operational review patterns across data feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and Oracle reporting systems.
Optimized SQL queries, historical retention models, Oracle schemas, and Redshift-backed workloads to improve performance, maintainability, and downstream analytics usability.
Created stakeholder-facing dashboards and tools using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to support internal reporting and executive-level visibility.
Documented pipeline logic, metric definitions, data processing assumptions, operational support steps, and handoff procedures to improve governance and long-term maintainability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Developed analytics and reporting outputs from Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities and translate monitoring data into actionable insights.
Built dashboards and operational reporting views that improved visibility into transaction behavior, performance trends, and reliability risks.
Partnered with development and business stakeholders to define reporting needs, validate metrics, and communicate performance findings clearly.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise-scale telemetry environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting operational analytics, dashboards, and executive reporting.
Built Perl and Korn shell automation for extracting, transforming, and distributing performance data, replacing manual exports with repeatable reporting workflows.
Designed standardized dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, documentation, and reusable reporting structures adopted across client environments.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, infrastructure, and operations teams to interpret data, troubleshoot bottlenecks, and improve production visibility.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed enterprise telecom application data under load to identify throughput limits, SQL/JDBC bottlenecks, memory pressure, CPU behavior, and thread contention.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread-dump automation to improve runtime visibility during performance and regression testing.
Documented baseline metrics, regression thresholds, and technical findings used by engineering teams for release-readiness decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, preserving data integrity and transaction performance.
Optimized SQL and Oracle access patterns for high-volume workloads while reducing physical hardware footprint by 95%.
Built validation and regression testing utilities to verify correctness across millions of migrated transaction records.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and phased cutover support for a mission-critical enterprise migration.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing interfaces and reporting processes for telecom-scale transaction systems.
Improved database performance by 10x through SQL, sequence, and process optimization while reducing memory usage by 75%.
Built automation scripts in Korn shell, Perl, Awk, Syncsort, and SQL to support operational data processing, reporting, deployment, and housekeeping workflows.
Supported QA cycles, production issue triage, release support, documentation, and cross-team troubleshooting.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data pipelines, data modeling, dimensional modeling, star schemas, data lakes, data warehouses, curated datasets
skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, C++
skills.Cloud Data Platforms: AWS Redshift, S3, Glue, Athena, EC2, ECS; Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery concepts
skills.Big Data / Processing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Pandas, Parquet, distributed data processing
skills.Analytics Engineering: Reporting layers, business-ready datasets, semantic-style models, metric definitions, KPI documentation, dashboard support
skills.Orchestration / Delivery: Airflow, batch workflows, CI/CD concepts, version-controlled transformations, code reviews, release discipline
skills.Data Quality / Governance: Data validation, reconciliation, monitoring, alerting, lineage documentation, data dictionaries, access-control awareness
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, Redshift, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL performance tuning, schema design
skills.BI / Visualization: Streamlit, matplotlib, plotly, operational dashboards, executive reporting, Looker/Metabase/Tableau concepts
skills.AI-Assisted Development: Claude Code, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot concepts, agentic workflows, RAG-style retrieval, LLM APIs, quality gates, AI-generated output validation

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python and AI-assisted automation pipeline using Claude Code and Grok/xAI APIs. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based job scoring, tailored JSON resume and cover generation, quality gates, document rendering, and application tracking.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a forecasting-oriented analytics workflow using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to process telemetry data, prepare model-ready datasets, and deliver capacity insights.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a scalable AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, and Parquet for raw ingestion, transformation, curated analytics datasets, and query optimization.
